meta.title: Charles Blahous on Pay-Go and Congress
meta.description: Hudson Institute Senior Fellow Charles Blahous discusses the concept of Pay-Go and how Congress uses this in regards to the federal deficit and budget. Pay-Go says that Congress should not take any action that increases the deficit. If Congress acts to increase spending, it has to offset that spending with cuts elsewhere in the budget.
